locator.quote: A shakeout script uses a non-standard population size

text: The 0-children-bred anomaly happens when len(survivors) >= population_size; one cause is a shakeout script using a non-standard population size.

locator.quote: The selection top_pct is too generous relative to population_size

text: Another cause of zero offspring: the selection top_pct is too generous relative to population_size, so survivors fill all slots.

locator.quote: The breeding pool IS correctly scoped to the current run's agents

text: The breeding pool IS correctly scoped to the current run's agents; the large model count in the operator's log was the scoreboard's full ranking, not the pool.
